name: Silver the Hedgehog
description: Thrown into the scorching ruins of a future burned by Solaris, Silver is the only survivor... or so it seems? His mind is haunted by the ghosts of the past, and his hope is fading with each passing day. But what if he is not alone? What if in the ashes lies a new threat... or a last chance to make things right?
creator: SaTaZzAr
